title: Admissibility of Electronic Records and Digital Certificates
description: Governs the admissibility of electronic or digital records in court (replaces Section 65B of Indian Evidence Act). Mandates a Certificate under Section 63 BSA signed by a person in charge of the computer device/system certifying the authenticity, hash value, and integrity of digital evidence.
punishment: Evidentiary standard for legal proof of emails, WhatsApp chats, CCTV footage, call recordings, and server logs.

title: Primary Evidence
description: Primary evidence means the document itself produced for the inspection of the Court. Includes electronic records stored in original media or multiple simultaneous copies.
